name: oss-thanks
description: Auto-star GitHub repositories actually used by AI coding agents, or queue them for review based on the user's saved preference.

interface.shortDescription: Star GitHub repos actually used by agents
interface.longDescription: Record GitHub repositories that AI coding agents actually clone, install, download, or explicitly open and reference. On first use, ask whether to auto-star immediately or review at the end, then remember that choice.
defaultPrompt: Ask how OSS Thanks should run and remember my choice
Record GitHub repos actually used in this task
Show the OSS Thanks review queue before finishing
